case.title: O'TOOLE v. STATE OF NEW JERSEY

opinion.h: O'TOOLE v. STATE OF NEW JERSEY, 296 U.S. 613 (1935)
Arthur O'TOOLE, petitioner, v. STATE OF NEW JERSEY.* No. 329.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Arthur O'Toole, of New York City, for petitioner.
For opinion below, see 115 N. J. Law, 205, 178 A. 780.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Court of Errors and Appeals for the State of New Jersey denied.
* Rehearing denied 296 U.S. 662, 56 S. Ct. 168.[ O'Toole v. State of New Jersey 296 U.S. 613 (1935) ]
